CONTENT.Career: Tripi is a youth product of Roma, where he served as a captain of their youth team. He made his professional debut with Roma in a 2–0 UEFA Europa League win over CFR Cluj on 26 November 2020.On 16 December 2022, Tripi signed a contract until 2025 with Slovenian PrvaLiga outfit Mura.
CONTENT.External links: Filippo Tripi at SoccerwayLega Serie A Profile Archived 2021-01-24 at the Wayback MachineFIGC U18 Profile

SUMMARY: Filippo Tripi (born 6 January 2002) is an Italian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Slovenian PrvaLiga club Mura.
